📍 Atlanta, Georgia

Shamit Bhat

Senior Director of Product Management · GSMA

With over 20 years of experience as a global product leader, Shamit is a strategic products and innovation expert with a proven track record of delivering innovative and complex product development programs. He heads the GSMA's Network Services portfolio, which includes Interoperability, Circularity, and Fraud Prevention Services.

Within Interoperability Services, he oversees flagship products including Network Settings Exchange, Interoperability Testing, and the Entitlements service — collectively serving as a critical bridge between mobile operators and device manufacturers, ensuring seamless and consistent end‑user experiences.

Shamit also leads GSMA's Circularity Services, connecting buyers and sellers to advance a global reverse‑commerce ecosystem, and oversees Fraud Prevention Services including IRSF.

🔗 LinkedIn ✉️ Contact me

IRSF and fraud prevention services protecting operators and end users globally.

⛓️

Blockchain & DLT

Pioneering distributed ledger technology for wholesale roaming and telecom back-office transformation.

Beyond work

Hamsa Soham Ekam

A deeply spiritual practitioner and meditator, Shamit lives by the philosophy of oneness — the belief that all life is interconnected. He sees goodness in everyone and finds joy in forging deep, authentic connections with people from every walk of life and corner of the world.

🏏

Sport & fitness

An active sportsman who loves cricket, tennis, and football. Complements team sports with regular gym training.

🌱

Gardening

Finds peace and grounding in the garden — a meditative counterbalance to the pace of global product leadership.

🎹

Learning piano & Spanish

Currently picking up piano and Spanish — two new languages, one musical and one spoken, both expressions of a love of learning.

🤝

Mentoring & advising

Freely gives time to mentor emerging talent and advise small businesses, believing in paying it forward.

🌍

A global citizen

From India to England to the USA — a life of global friendships forged across cultures and continents.

Causes close to my heart

❤️ Mental health 💧 Water for all 📚 Child education 🙏 Meditation & spirituality ∞ Oneness of all
